name: bubble pop electric
description: a jujistsu sorcerer with the cursed technique to turn anything he touches into a frame (the last pose they were in, kinda like one frame of animation) for one second, he also has the ablity to move in 24 frames so he could move extremly fast while other fakemon cant keep up with him, but his defense, power, and hp are low to make up for this

moves.name: quick frame
moves.desc: bubble pop electric grab his oppenment and turns them into a frame and punches through them

moves.name: desisive strikes
moves.desc: using his quick speed you run toward the openment and punch them repeatetly very quickly

moves.name: you use a hidden cursed tool to stab the oppenment near you
domain exapansion, time cell moon palace
moves.desc: Creates a barrier around himself where people cant escape from where your cursed techniqe hits everyone in it, unless you copy his position while in the domain parts of your body become frames and break, this can range from your whole body to the cells on your skin.
